headline: McDonald's earnings, Fed commentary, labor data: What to Watch
summary: Asking for a Trend Host Josh Lipton previews several of the biggest stories to come tomorrow, Thursday, May 7, including earnings results from McDonald's (MCD), Shell (SHEL), Airbnb (ABNB), CoreWeave (CRWV), and Coinbase (COIN); comments from several Federal Reserve presidents; and this week's reading on initial jobless claims.

headline: Ahead of Airbnb Earnings, Here Is What Barchart Options Data Shows for ABNB Stock
summary: Airbnb is set to report its fiscal Q1 earnings tomorrow (May 7) after market close. Options traders are currently positioned for upside in ABNB stock after its quarterly release.

headline: Are Wall Street Analysts Bullish on Airbnb Stock?
summary: While Airbnb has underperformed the broader market over the past year, Wall Street analysts maintain a moderately optimistic outlook about the stock’s prospects.
